paragraphs.source: Anthropic’s Claude 4.6 Opus and Claude Code have soared in demand. Anthropic’s ARR has nearly tripled in just a single quarter from $9B at the end of last year to over $25B today. Open models such as GLM and Kimi K2.5 caused open model use cases to soar. Capital raises by firms like Anthropic, OpenAI, and various Neolabs also demand GPUs.

pro.text: Anthropic 的 Claude 4.6 Opus 和 Claude Code 需求激增。短短一个季度内，Anthropic 的年度经常性收入（ARR）几乎翻了三倍，从去年底的 90 亿美元飙升至如今的 250 亿美元以上。GLM 和 Kimi K2.5 等开源模型也推动了开源模型应用场景的暴涨。此外，Anthropic、OpenAI 以及各类新兴 AI 实验室（Neolab）完成融资后，同样产生了对 GPU 的庞大需求。

paragraphs.source: GPU Rental Pricing is the latest of many compute related products and services to see a dramatic tightness in supply and resulting jump in pricing. H100 1-year GPU rental contract pricing has shot up almost 40% from a low of $1.70/hr/GPU in October 2025 to $2.35/hr/GPU by March 2026.

pro.text: 在众多算力相关的产品与服务中，GPU 租赁是最新一个因供应极度紧张而导致价格跳涨的领域。H100 的 1 年期 GPU 租赁合同价格已从 2025 年 10 月 1.70 美元/小时/GPU 的低点，暴涨近 40%，至 2026 年 3 月的 2.35 美元/小时/GPU。

paragraphs.source: On-Demand GPU rental capacity is sold out across all GPU types – those that have locked up on-demand instances are not willing to relinquish this capacity back into the pool despite recent price hikes. Trying to find GPU compute in early 2026 has been like trying to book airplane tickets on the last flight out, high prices, and almost no availability. That’s the PC analogy, but the more accurate analogy is that trying to rent a cluster is actually like trying to buy drugs.

sections.title_translation: GPU租赁市场迎来价格飙升

paragraphs.source: The chart illustrating the 1y H100 rental price hardly does the trend justice – anecdotes from our first-hand experience in trying to procure compute and feedback from others in the market paints an even starker picture.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The chart illustrating the 1y H100 rental price hardly does the trend justice – anecdotes from our first-hand experience in trying to procure compute and feedback from others in the market paints an even starker picture.

pro.text: 展示一年期 H100 租赁价格的图表，其实不足以充分反映这一趋势的猛烈程度——我们在尝试采购算力时的第一手见闻，加上市场其他参与者的反馈，描绘出了一幅更为严峻的画面。

key_points: Fierce bidding wars are pushing spot instances to $14/hr.
Zero capacity is coming off contracts as renewals happen at 2-3 year old rates.
Blackwell availability is severely constrained, with capacity booked through late 2026.

paragraphs.source: Demand is strong across many very heterogeneous use cases and there is no one-size fits all approach. There are plenty of inference workloads like large mixture of experts (MoE) inference that run best on the latest large world-size systems like the GB300 NVL72, while training workloads can have the best price performance on H100s, keeping demand high even for older cards.

There are plenty of inference workloads like large mixture of experts (MoE) inference that run best on the latest large world-size systems like the GB300 NVL72, while training workloads can have the best price performance on H100s, keeping demand high even for older cards.

pro.text: 在众多高度异构的应用场景中，需求依然强劲，且不存在放之四海而皆准的方案。大量推理工作负载（例如大型混合专家模型（MoE）推理）在 GB300 NVL72 等最新超大规模系统上运行效果最佳，而训练工作负载在 H100 上则能实现最佳性价比，这使得即使是老款显卡也维持着高企的需求。

sections.title: GPU Rental Prices – The Comeback Kid

paragraphs.source: But how did the market come to this point? Only six months ago, most market observers were skeptical on GPU terminal value and assumed an inexorably steep fall in GPU rental rates over time. Financial analysts chastised any Neocloud or Hyperscaler that used a 6-year depreciation period for its GPU compute assets. Let’s quickly recap the story so far before we discuss how trends could evolve in the future.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: But how did the market come to this point? Only six months ago, most market observers were skeptical on GPU terminal value and assumed an inexorably steep fall in GPU rental rates over time. Financial analysts chastised any Neocloud or Hyperscaler that used a 6-year depreciation period for its GPU compute assets. Let’s quickly recap the story so far before we discuss how trends could evolve in the future.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: But how did the market come to this point? Let’s quickly recap the story so far before we discuss how trends could evolve in the future.

pro.text: 市场究竟是如何走到这一步的？仅仅六个月前，大多数市场观察人士还在质疑 GPU 的残值，认定 GPU 租赁费率势必将面临断崖式下跌。金融分析师更是对任何将 GPU 算力资产折旧期设为 6 年的新兴算力云厂商或超大规模云厂商予以猛烈抨击。在探讨未来趋势走向之前，我们先快速回顾一下此前的市场演变。

applied_terms: 'The Comeback Kid' requires a culturally resonant equivalent (e.g., 王者归来/绝地反击).
'Chastised' and 'inexorably steep fall' need strong, vivid Chinese verbs and adjectives to capture the past bearish intensity.

understanding.role_in_article: Explains the fundamental driver of the price surge (high AI ROI) while contrasting it with past bearish market sentiment.

High ROI will sustain demand, putting upward pressure on component and rental costs.

issues.description: 金融术语“terminal value”在资产折旧语境下意为“终值”或“残值”，此处被字面直译为“终端价值”。结合后文“6年折旧期”的语境，“终端价值”极易被误解为面向终端用户的业务价值，偏离了原文的财务估值视角。
在中文半导体行业术语中，“内存”严格来说专指 DRAM 等主存，而 NAND 属于“闪存”。英文的“memory”作为两者的统称时应译为“存储器”。译文“DRAM 和 NAND 的内存价格”在中文语境下存在分类从属的逻辑冲突。

paragraphs.source: Before late 2025, the prevailing expectation across the ecosystem was that Hopper (i.e. H100 and H200) rental prices would drop considerably as Blackwell deployments ramped given the latter’s much lower cost of compute. Instead, the opposite happened in late 2025: demand for H100s was holding firm, and in many cases, strengthening. The rapid adoption of open-weight models and accelerating inference demand at that time was the first sign of the insatiable wave of compute demand coming to market.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Before late 2025, the prevailing expectation across the ecosystem was that Hopper (i.e. H100 and H200) rental prices would drop considerably as Blackwell deployments ramped given the latter’s much lower cost of compute. Instead, the opposite happened in late 2025: demand for H100s was holding firm, and in many cases, *strengthening*. The rapid adoption of open-weight models and accelerating inference demand at that time was the first sign of the insatiable wave of compute demand coming to market.

The rapid adoption of open-weight models and accelerating inference demand at that time was the first sign of the insatiable wave of compute demand coming to market.

pro.text: 在 2025 年底之前，整个生态系统的普遍预期是，鉴于 Blackwell 的算力成本大幅降低，随着其部署规模的扩大，Hopper（即 H100 和 H200）的租赁价格将出现大幅下跌。然而，2025 年底的实际情况却截然相反：市场对 H100 的需求依然坚挺，甚至在许多场景下还在不断走强。当时开放权重模型的快速普及和推理需求的加速爆发，正是市场即将迎来算力需求无底洞狂潮的初步端倪。

paragraphs.source: January was the next inflection point for compute when memory pricing, across both DRAM and NAND pricing, went from rising aggressively for several quarters, to going completely parabolic, with LPDDR5 and DDR5 contract prices tracking toward ~4x and ~5x year-on-year increases respectively in 1Q26 based on our Memory Model.

pro.text: 1 月份成为了算力市场的下一个拐点。当时，存储器价格（包括 DRAM 和 NAND）在连续数个季度猛涨之后，开始呈现抛物线式暴涨。根据我们的存储器模型，LPDDR5 和 DDR5 的合同价格在 2026 年第一季度预计将分别实现约 4 倍和 5 倍的同比增长。

paragraphs.source: To manage margin risk stemming from this rapid hike in component costs, OEMs began repricing AI servers at levels that significantly exceeded the underlying increase in component costs. This complicated the cluster capital investment processes as higher server acquisition costs compressed prospective project returns, forcing some operators to slow-roll or abandon deployments. In effect, supply that would have otherwise come online was being withheld, tightening the rental market further.

pro.text: 为了应对组件成本飙升带来的利润率风险，OEM 厂商开始对 AI 服务器重新定价，且提价幅度远超底层组件成本的实际上涨幅度。这让集群资本投资决策变得更加棘手，因为高昂的服务器采购成本压缩了项目的预期投资回报率，迫使部分运营商放缓甚至放弃部署计划。这实际上导致原本应上线的算力供应遭到搁置，进一步加剧了租赁市场的紧缺态势。

paragraphs.source: Amid the server procurement disarray cause by this AI Server Pricing Apocalypse, GPU rental demand was clearly accelerating, with most remaining spare capacity taken up completely during January and February. By March – it became increasingly impossible to find any H100s, H200s or B200 rental capacity for any term. Rental pricing broke above $2/hr/GPU for a 1y contract by late January, and then shot up 15-20% by mid-to-late February vs end January and is set to rise another 15-20% month-on-month by the end of March.

pro.text: 在这场“AI 服务器定价末日”引发的采购乱局中，GPU 租赁需求显著加速，大部分剩余的闲置算力在 1 月和 2 月被抢购一空。到了 3 月，无论合同期限长短，想要找到任何 H100、H200 或 B200 的租赁算力已经变得几乎不可能。1 年期合同的租赁价格在 1 月下旬突破了每小时每卡 2 美元的大关，随后在 2 月中下旬较 1 月底飙升了 15-20%，并预计到 3 月底还将实现 15-20% 的环比上涨。

paragraphs.source: A major driver of demand early this year arose from native media generation - Seedance and Nano Banana are driving massive increases in token throughput as users generate and refine images and video at scale. But the most visible driver of demand is the emergence of multi-agent workloads executing multi-step workflows, operating at high concurrency and iterating continuously, leading to parabolic growth in token and compute consumption.

pro.text: 似乎我们圈子里的几乎每个人都是 Claude Code 的狂热用户——但我们也认识到，我们的联系人圈子完全沉浸在 AI 和半导体的方方面面，因此他们只是先头部队。对于许多财富 500 强企业和更广泛的大众而言，Claude Code 和智能体（Agentic）世界只不过是偶尔出现在 Facebook 动态或最喜欢的 NPR 播客里的奇闻轶事。他们完全没有意识到，智能体世界即将向全球释放一场生产力狂潮与颠覆性变革。

paragraphs.source: As those in the broader economy that recognize the amazing return on investment from using AI Tools join us in surfing this tidal wave, there will continue to be a step shift higher in token consumption over time. The debate on the true return of using AI is now a settled question – the use of AI tools can deliver value an order of magnitude greater than the cost of using the tools. The shift up and to the right in the demand curve for tokens is providing a powerful and relatively inelastic (for now) force driving up GPU rental pricing.

paragraphs.source: Many GPU rental indices are derived from spot/on-demand listings or posted pricing, but most of the GPU rental market is transacted on a long-term basis with contracts of at least 6mths and longer. These prices are negotiated on a bilateral basis and such quotes and transactions prices are not typically posted to any freely available online databases. Most large Neoclouds have a preference to rent out capacity on at least a 1-year term with 2 or 3 year terms preferred – even better if they can land 5y large offtake agreements. The SemiAnalysis H100 1-year rental contract price index specifically targets the contract market, where most of the rental volume is transacted. The index references a specific tenor, making it easier for users to understand what market segment it addresses and allowing users to validate these trends against what they may be seeing.

pro.text: 许多 GPU 租赁指数源于竞价/按需实例的挂牌价或公开报价，但 GPU 租赁市场的大部分交易都是基于长期合同（至少 6 个月或更长）。这些价格通过双边协商敲定，相关的报价和交易价格通常不会发布在任何免费的在线数据库中。大多数大型新兴算力云厂商倾向于出租至少 1 年期的算力，2 年或 3 年期更佳——如果能拿下 5 年期的大型包销协议则最为理想。SemiAnalysis H100 一年期租赁合同价格指数专门针对这一占据绝大部分租赁交易量的合约市场。该指数锚定特定的合同期限，不仅让用户更容易理解其所反映的细分市场，还能帮助用户将这些趋势与他们观察到的实际情况进行交叉验证。

paragraphs.source: There is no guarantee that buyers of compute are actually transacting at prices publicly posted by Hyperscalers and Neoclouds. These posted prices may shift around, giving a helpful directional signal for how GPU rental prices are trending but look at these shifts cannot provide an accurate estimate for actual transaction prices. Often times, these publicly posted prices only adjust after the contract market has shifted, lagging actual trends in compute demand. In particular, the on-demand operates by fixing price at a constant level with take-up rates or utilization rates the variable. This pricing is only adjusted on an ad-hoc basis as needed. More on how this market operates later in the article.

pro.text: 算力买家的实际交易价格，未必就是超大规模云厂商和新兴算力云厂商公开的挂牌价。这些挂牌价的波动固然能为 GPU 租赁价格走势提供有价值的方向性信号，但仅凭这些变动，无法准确估算实际的交易价格。通常情况下，这些公开挂牌价往往在合同市场发生转变之后才会调整，滞后于算力需求的实际趋势。特别是按需市场，其运作逻辑是将价格维持在固定水平，而将采用率或利用率作为变量。这种定价仅在必要时才会进行临时调整。关于该市场的运作机制，我们将在后文详细探讨。

paragraphs.source: Before late 2025, GPU rental pricing was more competitive as operators had much greater GPU inventory while end demand was only starting to accelerate meaningfully. Pricing exercises were competitive, with multiple Neoclouds able to offer very competitive pricing. These operators prioritized utilization and ensuring they did not miss out on sweating fixed compute assets before the next GPU refresh cycle potentially puts pressure on pricing for incumbent GPU servers.

paragraphs.source: GPU rental providers’ strategy has pivoted 180 degrees since then. Neoclouds and Hyperscalers are now in the driver’s seat – they can now negotiate for more favorable terms such as higher prepay, better pricing, longer contract lengths and can even pick and choose the contract start and end dates to match their inventory availability. Time is also now on the Neoclouds’ side – they can plan deployments on their own time, harnessing the increasing price climate to build the best book of clients for a given cluster over time.

paragraphs.source: Short-term rentals represent the very front end of the rental term structure and in many cases represents residual capacity, though many such as Runpod and Lambda very successfully focus on providing considerable capacity of flexible on-demand or spot capacity. On-demand pricing functions tends to function very differently than the rest of the contract GPU rental market. Providers usually set a fixed price for on-demand capacity and will only very infrequently adjust prices.

paragraphs.source: Providers will adjust pricing on a one-off basis in response to utilization levels – if utilization is too low, they will drop pricing to attract demand. If utilization is maxed out – then prices will be hiked as the provider determines that utilization will remain high even at higher pricing levels. This is why a time series of Neocloud posted on-demand pricing will be flat for a long period of time before gapping up or down. With the on-demand market, utilization is the best high frequency indicator of demand, and not price.

pro.text: 供应商会根据利用率水平对价格进行一次性调整——如果利用率过低，他们会降价以吸引需求；如果利用率拉满，供应商就会上调价格，因为他们判定即使在更高的价格水平下，利用率仍将保持高位。这就是为什么新兴算力云厂商公布的按需实例定价时间序列，往往会在很长一段时间内保持平稳，随后才出现跳空上涨或下跌的阶跃式变化。在按需实例市场中，衡量需求的最佳高频指标是利用率，而不是价格。

paragraphs.source: The more economically relevant segments are the contract markets where most GPU rentals by value are transacted. The 1-year segment captures the marginal demand from non-AI lab customers and spillovers from large buyers, making it the most sensitive indicator of tightening conditions. AI Natives and smaller AI Labs can be seen mostly in the 1-3y tenors, though increasingly these labs and AI Natives are looking to lock up compute by contracting for longer terms of more than 4 years and even agreeing to high prepays of above 20% which were previously atypical for 4y+ deals.

pro.text: 更具经济参考价值的细分领域是合同市场，按交易金额计算，绝大多数GPU租赁交易均在此完成。1年期市场吸收了非AI实验室客户的边际需求以及大型买家的溢出需求，因此成为反映供应趋紧最敏锐的指标。AI原生企业和规模较小的AI实验室主要集中在1至3年的合同期限内。然而，目前的趋势是，这些实验室和AI原生企业正越来越多地寻求通过签订4年以上的长期合同来锁定算力，甚至愿意接受超过20%的高额预付比例，这在以往4年以上的交易中并不常见。

Most GPU rentals by value occur in this mid-term segment.
AI Natives are increasingly seeking longer lock-ups to secure compute.

paragraphs.source: Lastly, the 4–5 year segment is dominated by AI labs locking in huge quantities of capacity early. These deals involve large clusters of 50MW or 100MW or even larger – equivalent to about ~24,000 to 48,000 GB300 NVL72 GPUs. In aggregate – these deals represent a very large proportion of the overall Neocloud GPU rental market.

'Captive to AI Labs' means exclusively bound or dedicated to them (被AI实验室独占/绑定).

understanding.relation_to_next: Uses the reality of these massive physical capacity lock-ups to highlight the irrationality of public market sentiment in the next section.
key_points: The 4-5 year segment is dominated by massive AI lab clusters (50-100MW).
AI labs are hoarding supply by renewing existing clusters, preventing supply from re-entering the sub-4y market.
These dynamics force smaller players to compete fiercely for remaining mid-term capacity.

'Captive to AI Labs' means exclusively bound or dedicated to them (被AI实验室独占/绑定).

paragraphs.source: AI Labs like these contracts as they can lock in a huge amounts of compute in one go to cater to rapidly accelerating end demand. The AI Labs also have considerable influence on the cluster design, making decisions regarding storage, networking, CPU compute and more. These are very often bare metal deals as AI Labs have the engineering expertise to customize more layers of the tech stack and extract the highest performance per TCO possible.

paragraphs.source: Neoclouds like these deals as they can focus their sales resources on just a few large offtake deals rather than dozens of smaller deals which would end up generating the same amount of revenue. Longer-term contracts are also great for Neoclouds as they can then use these contracts to arrange debt financing on favorable terms that will match the tenor of the contract, removing most duration and GPU rental price risk from the equation and locking in a teens project IRR in most cases. It is also common to see Hyperscalers backstop these deals – serving as the direct offtaker from these Neoclouds but then on-selling the compute to an AI Lab.

pro.text: 新兴算力云厂商同样青睐这类交易，因为他们可以将销售资源集中在少数几笔大型包销协议上，而无需耗费精力去跟进数十笔才能凑够同等营收的小单。长期合同对新兴算力云厂商还有一大优势：他们可以凭借这些合同，以优惠条件获得与合同期限相匹配的债务融资，从而基本消除久期错配和GPU租金波动的风险，并在大多数情况下锁定10%至20%区间的项目IRR。此外，超大规模云厂商为这类交易兜底的情况也屡见不鲜——他们先作为直接包销方向新兴算力云厂商采购，随后再将算力转售给AI实验室。

paragraphs.source: In today’s market climate, most of the large AI Clusters that are ramping are captive to AI Labs, who nonetheless have been dipping into the sub 4y market to supplement existing capacity ramps. They are also preventing supply from re-entering the sub 4y contract market by simply renewing their existing H100 and H200 clusters, indirectly playing in these markets. It will be interesting to see how supply-demand dynamics play out in the 1-3y contract market as AI Labs ramp their GB200 and GB300 megaclusters.

pro.text: 在当下的市场环境中，大多数处于爬坡阶段的大型AI集群均被AI实验室独占。尽管如此，这些实验室依然在向4年期以下市场出手，以填补现有算力爬坡期的缺口。同时，他们直接续签现有的H100和H200集群，截断了原本可能回流至4年期以下合同市场的算力供给，从而间接影响了该细分市场的格局。随着AI实验室逐步推进GB200和GB300巨型集群的部署，1至3年期合同市场的供需动态将如何演变，势必成为一大看点。

paragraphs.source: What is most striking is the disconnect between these underlying dynamics and broader market sentiment. Despite clear evidence of tightening supply and rising prices - conditions that should directly benefit Neocloud providers through margin expansion and stronger arguments for higher useful lives - public market sentiment has turned increasingly negative on names like CoreWeave, Nebius, IREN, and these companies’ share prices are currently at the low end of the 6-12mth trading range.

paragraphs.source: The dynamic is self-reinforcing. As Neoclouds see supply tighten and prices rise, they move to secure more hardware ahead of further price increases, which only tightens supply and pushes pricing higher still. This echoes the 2023–2024 GPU shortage, when tight supply allowed OEMs to push through outsized margin expansion and drove a sharp spike in server pricing, though we think the server market is mature enough this time around that this may not repeat itself.

pro.text: 这种动态正在自我强化。随着新兴算力云厂商察觉到供应收紧与价格上涨，他们纷纷在价格进一步攀升前抢占更多硬件，而这只会加剧供应紧张，进一步推高价格。这与2023至2024年的GPU短缺期如出一辙，当时紧缺的供应让OEM厂商得以大幅扩张利润率，并导致服务器价格暴涨；不过我们认为，如今的服务器市场已足够成熟，这一幕这次可能不会重演。

paragraphs.source: As we argued in a recent note to our institutional clients, the re-acceleration in GPU rental pricing improves Neocloud ROIC by expanding margins on already-deployed capital. At the same time, higher rental rates extend the economic useful life of existing GPUs, meaning invested capital generates cash flows for longer before requiring reinvestment.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: As we argued in a recent note to our institutional clients, the re-acceleration in GPU rental pricing [improves Neocloud ROIC](https://semianalysis.com/institutional/the-value-of-a-gpu-is-going-up/) by expanding margins on already-deployed capital. At the same time, higher rental rates extend the economic useful life of existing GPUs, meaning invested capital generates cash flows for longer before requiring reinvestment.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: As we argued in a recent note to our institutional clients, the re-acceleration in GPU rental pricing improves Neocloud ROIC by expanding margins on already-deployed capital. At the same time, higher rental rates extend the economic useful life of existing GPUs, meaning invested capital generates cash flows for longer before requiring reinvestment.

pro.text: 正如我们近期在致机构客户的报告中所指出的，GPU租金重拾涨势，扩大了已部署资本的利润率，从而提升了新兴算力云厂商的投资回报率（ROIC）。同时，更高的租金延长了现有GPU的经济使用寿命，这意味着投入资本在需要进行再投资之前，能够创造更长期的现金流。

issues.description: “push through”带有凭借卖方市场优势强行落地、转嫁成本的意味，“outsized”强调超常、超额。原译“大幅扩张利润率”略显平淡，未能完全体现出当时OEM厂商在紧缺市场下的强势姿态。
“实现……扩张”属于典型的翻译腔（虚化动词+抽象名词），在中文金融研报中，通常有更精炼、地道的表达。
“进行再投资”中的“进行”是一个多余的动词外壳，略显拖沓。

paragraphs.source: Neoclouds with shorter contract tenors will see capacity roll off and reprice into the current environment, capturing immediate margin expansion. At the same time, Hyperscalers and Neoclouds locking in next-generation capacity over multi-year terms will benefit.

pro.text: 合同期限较短的新兴算力云厂商将迎来算力租约到期，并按当前市场环境重新定价，从而立即实现利润率扩张。与此同时，通过多年期合同锁定下一代算力产能的超大规模云厂商和新兴算力云厂商也将从中受益。

understanding.role_in_article: Delivers the definitive conclusion that prices will structurally rise, supported by high ROIC and faster repricing cycles.

key_points: GPU rental pricing is structurally forced upward.
Shorter duration contracts lead to faster repricing in a supply-constrained market.
High Return on Invested Capital (ROIC) justifies and sustains the rising costs.
